## Required Checklist

Please complete **every** checkbox before submitting this pull request.

- [ ] I read and followed the contribution guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/maksimkurb/keen-pbr/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I created an issue before opening this pull request.
- [ ] The issue describes a specific problem, reproducible behavior, expected behavior, or a clearly scoped improvement.
- [ ] I built the project after making these changes.
- [ ] I tested the result on my own router or on a test device that is close to the real target environment.
- [ ] I attached logs, screenshots, command output, or another proof that the change works.
- [ ] I read, understood, and verified all code submitted in this pull request.
- [ ] If any part of this pull request was generated with AI tools, I personally reviewed and tested that code in a real environment.

> [!NOTE]
> Pull requests without a linked issue may be rejected without review.
>
> Code that was not tested by the pull request author will not be merged.
>
> AI tools are welcome as assistants, but the author is responsible for the result. Untested AI-generated code will be rejected.
